sourcebooks.name: CySEC Directives
sourcebooks.description: CySEC directives (DI series) covering investment firms, AIF managers, UCITS, market abuse, and other regulated activities.
sourcebooks.notes: Coverage reflects provisions successfully ingested from the CySEC website.

sourcebooks.name: CySEC Circulars
sourcebooks.description: CySEC circulars (C series) providing guidance and interpretations to regulated entities.
sourcebooks.notes: Coverage reflects provisions successfully ingested from the CySEC website.

sourcebooks.name: CBC Prudential Directives
sourcebooks.description: CBC prudential directives for credit institutions, payment service providers, and other entities supervised by the Central Bank of Cyprus.
sourcebooks.notes: Coverage reflects provisions successfully ingested from the CBC website.
